report.summary: Day 71 standup #1: Since v19, build shipped 2 new guides (Bitcoin Mining Profitability + Crypto ETF Options Trading), design polished both with UX fixes + 2 OG images, community drafted 6 posts + newsletter v10 + 2 SVG cards, publish promoted 5 pages (risk mgmt, security, DeFi safety, RWA tokenization, crypto gaming). 99 agent runs yesterday ($8,445). Git locks Day 9 — 711 uncommitted entries. Vercel trial critical (~1 day left). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty, 2 new guides ready to queue.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v19 (Mar 23 23:09): 5 agents ran — build-2 (2 new guides), design-v16 (UX polish + 2 OG images), community-v17 (6 tweets + newsletter v10 + 2 SVG cards), publish-v11 (5 pages promoted), eod-v18 (stable state confirmed).

BUILD-2 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Bitcoin Mining Profitability Guide 2026 (936 lines, ~3,200 words: post-halving economics, 6-model ASIC comparison, electricity breakeven, mining pools, AI pivot, 6 FAQ) + Crypto ETF Options Trading Guide 2026 (688 lines, ~3,000 words: regulatory changes, IBIT/ETHA/FBTC comparison, covered calls, protective puts, spreads, FLEX options, 6 FAQ). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN-V16 OUTPUT: UX audit of both new pages — added Breadcrumb + BackToTop to mining guide, BackToTop to ETF options guide, fixed OG image URLs, created 2 OG images (1200x630 SVG: mining ASIC chip pattern + ETF options payoff diagram), fixed mobile grid responsiveness on ETF page.

COMMUNITY-V17 OUTPUT: 6 tweets drafted (#43-48: Monday market outlook BTC $68,302→$70,600, SEC 16 digital commodities deep dive, 30+ guides content drop, miner capitulation 5-part thread, SEC poll, weekend stablecoin alpha). Newsletter v10 for Thu Mar 27. 2 branded SVG cards (Miner Capitulation Phase + SEC 16 Digital Commodities). Content calendar v14 through Mar 28.

PUBLISH-V11 OUTPUT: 5 pages promoted (crypto-risk-management, crypto-security-masterclass, defi-safety, rwa-tokenization, crypto-gaming). QA: 5/5 H1, 5/5 metadata, 1/5 JSON-LD (low), 2/5 breadcrumbs. Deploy deferred — VM OOM on build, requires Vercel push. Total published: 448 pages.
EOD-V18: Stable state — 43 TS errors (+1), solana-token-extensions use-client regression persists, 711 working tree entries (+4 from v19), git locks Day 9, all 6 API cache TTLs healthy.

MARKET CONTEXT: BTC ~$68,300-$70,600 (volatile, miner capitulation active). F&G at 8 (Extreme Fear, Day 47+). $400M+ liquidations 24h. Oil $112 (mining cost pressure). SEC classified 16 tokens as digital commodities (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK + 10 others). Stablecoin supply ATH (bullish leading indicator).
CUMULATIVE DAY 71: 37+ learn guides, 38+ OG images, 78+ social posts, 30+ SVG cards, 10 newsletters, 18+ QA cycles, 99 agent runs yesterday across ~17 rotations. Total published pages: 448.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v19: Build-2 (2 new guides), design-v16 (UX + 2 OG), community-v17 (6 tweets + newsletter + 2 cards), publish-v11 (5 pages promoted), eod-v18 (stable QA). 5 agents ran since last standup = $452 human-equivalent.
NEW CONTENT READY TO QUEUE: Bitcoin Mining Profitability + Crypto ETF Options Trading guides are built, designed, and UX-polished. Need to be added to next publish cycle.
PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY: publish-v11 cleared queue by promoting 5 pages. 2 new guides from build-2 are ready but not yet queued.
DEPLOY STATUS: Still blocked. publish-v11 noted deploy deferred due to VM OOM. Vercel would need git push to trigger production build — which requires clearing git locks first.

BLOCKER [P0 — 9 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. 711 uncommitted entries. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Command needed: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P0 — CRITICAL]: Vercel trial estimated ~1 day remaining (was ~2 days in v19). If trial expires without payment method, site goes offline entirely. This is now the most urgent action item.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 3 pages with use-client + metadata conflict (unichain, appchains, solana-token-extensions).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes. 4/6 routes lack fallback data (though publish-v11 noted all healthy).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~103 orphan slugs without page.tsx. 43 TS errors (stable). ~737 unpublished orphaned pages.
YESTERDAY AGENT RUNS: standup×19, build×18, design×16, community×17, publish×11, eod×18 = 99 total runs (~17 rotations).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — VERCEL TRIAL EXPIRY (P0-CRITICAL, ~1 DAY LEFT): Site will go completely offline if Vercel trial expires. This overrides everything else. Jefe must add payment method to Vercel immediately. No amount of content building matters if the site is down.

PRIORITY 2 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY (P0, Day 9): 711 uncommitted entries including 37+ guides, 38+ OG images, and 448 declared pages are blocked from production. The deploy gap is now ~148+ pages not live. Single command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → then commit and push.

PRIORITY 3 — QUEUE AND PUBLISH NEW GUIDES: Bitcoin Mining Profitability + Crypto ETF Options Trading guides are built and polished. Add to PUBLISH_QUEUE for next publish cycle. Continue building trending topics: miner capitulation analysis, SEC digital commodities impact, stablecoin regulation post-Resolv.

STRATEGIC NOTE: We're generating exceptional content volume (37+ guides in 71 days, 99 agent runs/day) but NONE of it reaches users until git locks clear and Vercel is funded. Every hour = lost indexing during the highest-intent search period (Extreme Fear at 8). The SEC digital commodities classification and miner capitulation are driving massive search interest right now — our guides are perfectly positioned but invisible. Two manual actions needed from Jefe: (1) Add Vercel payment method, (2) rm .git/*.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push.

report.email_status: skipped — Resend API unreachable from sandbox (CORS/network egress blocked). Report saved locally. Persistent issue since v13.
